description_long: This is a tall, upright wooden easel with a robust rectangular base and a vertical support structure. The main frame consists of two parallel vertical beams joined by horizontal crossbars, forming a stable H-frame design. A prominent central support runs vertically, with a horizontal ledge near the lower third for holding canvases or boards. The wood grain is visible, giving the surface a natural, slightly textured appearance. Diagonal braces reinforce the structure, ensuring stability and rigidity. The overall finish is matte, with a dark brown coloration typical of stained or varnished wood.
description: A tall, sturdy wooden H-frame easel with a visible wood grain and a horizontal ledge for holding canvases.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full H-frame structure, central vertical support, and the horizontal ledge for holding a canvas.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the angled support, diagonal braces, and the depth of the easel's frame.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the H-frame and the supporting crossbars, with less detail on the ledge.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the angled support and structural braces.
